frame_analyses.description: Initial entry with loop visible above the foam appendage.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good entry position with loop already open.

frame_analyses.description: Loop is approaching the base of the appendage.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Steady approach ensuring alignment with the target.

frame_analyses.description: Loop is positioned around the base of the appendage.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Loop looks adequately placed for cinching.

frame_analyses.description: The loop is being tightened around the appendage.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Tension applied correctly, no visible slack.

frame_analyses.description: Securing the loop and preparing to cut the excess tail.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Precision in cutting, no disturbance to the loop.

frame_analyses.description: Final adjustment and removing instruments from the field.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final inspection confirms loop placement is secure.

confidence_rationale: Clear visibility on loop placement and cinching. No deviation from mark observed.
technique_summary: Expert performance characterized by smooth, efficient deployment and cinching of the ligating loop.
strengths: Ensured tight cinch without any slack
improvement_suggestions: Continue practicing to maintain precision under varying conditions
